title: Revamped Arrow Physics
description: Arrows now stay longer in the air
body:
![Revamped Arrow Physics text representing the mod banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/13989d231d8832d0a8d31cd211e208292baa54ed.jpeg)
Arrows are supposed to be aerodynamic — at least, that’s how they work in real life. In Minecraft, though, they just don’t stick around in the air for very long.

## What exactly does this mod now do?
This mod changes the arrow physics to make them stay in the air longer, and the strength of the effect can be changed in the settings.
